description: Perform a BEM Characteristic Simulation (TSR Sweep) in QBlade using the pre-loaded wind turbine project to generate a Power Coefficient (Cp) vs Tip Speed Ratio (TSR) curve. Configure the simulation with a fixed wind speed of 10 m/s, a TSR range from 1 to 10 with a step of 0.5, and Prandtl Tip/Root loss corrections enabled. Export the resulting tabular data, including TSR and Cp values, to /home/ga/Documents/projects/cp_tsr_results.txt.
